chapter_title: Removal of Parked and Abandoned Vehicles
text: A local authority may either issue a franchise or execute a contract for the removal of abandoned vehicles in accordance with the provisions of this chapter.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 10. Removal of Parked and Abandoned Vehicles [22650 - 22856]
#### Article 1. Authority to Remove Vehicles [22650 - 22711]
##### § 22671

A local authority may either issue a franchise or execute a contract for the removal of abandoned vehicles in accordance with the provisions of this chapter.

*(Added by renumbering Section 22706 by Stats. 1980, Ch. 1111, Sec. 26.)*
